evidence_prompts: Show credible evidence that the problem exists and identify who is affected.
Explain the mechanism connecting the concept to the claimed outcome.
Identify stakeholders, dependencies, exclusion risks, and unintended harm.
Show a prototype, scenario test, or realistic validation plan appropriate to student-concept maturity.
Bound social and environmental impact claims to evidence that is actually supplied.

limitations: Student-concept use only; reject Mature Work.
Winner-only sample; no non-winning comparison group.
Observed iF Student context, not an official jury standard.
winnerStatement is a creator statement in this source, not a jury comment.
